reflection.candidate_lesson: Trades whose decision path did not call log_forex_decision() (reconstructed-from-fills entries) cluster catastrophically at 1W/5L — untraceable entries are a proxy for entries that bypassed the signal-gating stack entirely and must be blocked, not just logged.
reflection.mechanism: When an entry is reconstructed from the OANDA fills ledger with empty entry_context, signal_layers_active=[], and null commitment_score, it means the order was placed outside the vetted EdgePipeline path — no session gate (L2 NY_PM veto), no grade check (L1), no VIX carry gate (L8) fired. These are exactly the ungated impulse trades the tenets exist to prevent; the four USD_CAD LONGs all scratched at -0.0R (stopped at breakeven/entry noise) because there was no thesis behind them to defend the position.
reflection.testable_rule: if decision.signal_layers_active == [] or decision.commitment_score is None: return ForexVeto('untraced_entry — no gated signal path'); log for audit.

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
